name: Madeleine cookie
description:
The proud and glorious paladin from the Crème Republic! He is the very symbol of light and the most beautiful paladin ever existed, as he claims. Enemy falls before him, the heavenly light shines down at him like the sun! He is so bright he blinds Espresso and Tea knight constantly from existing in their spaces! But alas, being a glorious and popular paladin, he does wish to have a friend who would be there for him and treat him as a person, not just this shining knight...but how can he find one?

Guess who forgot to put tags before posting? Lol

I'll adjust the desc later
creator: CrypticDeadMoth
